name: Chad Johansen Golf Academy
about: Chad Johansen Golf Academy (CJGA) is an indoor golf facility and training studio offering golf simulator access, professional instruction, and club fitting services. Located in Chicagoland, the venue features multiple golf simulators with a focus on providing better technology and rates compared to on-course play. CJGA offers a variety of programs including junior golf leagues and coaching for different age groups, private lessons, and a club fitting studio. The facility is designed for golfers looking to improve their game through technology-driven practice and structured coaching.
why_golfers_like_it: Affordable simulator pricing with rates starting at $7.50 per person per hour
State-of-the-art golf simulators providing a realistic indoor golfing experience
Comprehensive junior golf programs and coaching for all skill levels
Professional instruction available with PGA professional Chad Johansen
Club fitting studio for custom equipment optimization

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned on website
No alcohol service mentioned on website

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't explicitly state whether clubs are provided. It's recommended to bring your own clubs for the most accurate fitting and practice experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website doesn't mention any food or drink service, but doesn't specify if outside food and drinks are allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The average golfer plays 18 holes per hour on the simulators.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Chad Johansen Golf Academy offers dedicated junior golf programs for various age groups, including winter, summer, and fall coaching programs for both junior and high school golfers.

opening_hours: FRIDAY 8AM-4PM | FRIDAY 4PM-8PM | SUNDAY 8AM-8PM | FRIDAY 8AM-4PM | FRIDAY 4PM-8PM | SUNDAY 8AM-8PM
